raw_responses.BFI-10_1: Ryan describes himself as someone who prefers quiet, laid-back environments, values meaningful connections, and often reflects on his life in a thoughtful and introspective way. raw_responses.BFI-10_2: Ryan Otoole describes himself as someone who values connection and has a strong sense of community, especially through his relationships with family, friends, and coworkers. He mentions feeling supported by people in his life and has a generally positive view of the people around him, such as his coworkers at the library and his sister. While he doesn't explicitly talk about trust, his emphasis on relationships and his willingness to rely on others (e.g., his sister pushing him to go back to school, his manager at the library, and his friends) suggests a general level of trust in others.
raw_responses.BFI-10_3: Ryan Otoole describes himself as someone who is actively working toward his goals, balancing school, work, and self-care. He reflects on his past decisions, like returning to school after a year of working at a bookstore, and shows a clear sense of intentionality in his life. He also discusses routines, health, and personal growth, all of which indicate a proactive and motivated mindset.
raw_responses.BFI-10_4: Ryan has discussed his struggles with anxiety and stress, particularly around making decisions about his future and managing his responsibilities. While he has made progress in learning to manage his stress through mindfulness, exercise, and talking to a counselor, he still acknowledges that he has days when he feels overwhelmed. This suggests that while he is working on handling stress better, he does not yet see himself as someone who is consistently relaxed or handles stress well.

raw_responses.BFI-10_6: Ryan describes himself as someone who values quiet, meaningful interactions and prefers a laid-back lifestyle. He mentions being close to a few friends and coworkers but doesn't emphasize a desire to be in large social groups or to be the center of attention. He also mentions not using social media much and preferring face-to-face conversations over online interactions, which suggests a more reserved or introverted nature.
raw_responses.BFI-10_7: Throughout the interview, Ryan Otoole comes across as reflective, kind, and focused on personal growth. He emphasizes the importance of support from others, values connection, and shows a tendency to be self-aware and introspective. He does not demonstrate any inclination toward criticizing or finding fault with others. He acknowledges areas where he could improve, such as managing stress and being more consistent in his routines. While he is not overly critical of himself, he also shows a willingness to grow and adapt. He does not appear to be someone who consistently takes pride in doing a thorough job, but he is also not dismissive of the importance of doing things well.
